subcodes.first_line: O Pen of Eternity! Make mention of him who was named Muhammad-before-Ja'far, that he may be mindful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم القدم ذکر الذی سمی بمحمد قبل جعفر لیکون متذکراً
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
